headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $128
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $118 to $128.
